film.title: Killing Season
film.overview: Two veterans of the Bosnian War, one American, one Serbian, clash in the remote Smoky Mountain wilderness.

dialogues.dialogue: (MOANING)  Getting that removed. Risky.  You proud of what you did?  Or maybe you don't want to forget.  It's like with your shot.

in the middle of nowhere. And we got to the top, my men lined the prisoners up  on their knees facing away.  I joined up to make my father proud,  but when I told him, he tried to talk me out of it.  "Remember the elk," he said.
